title: NLP Research Engineer
description: Research-focused position working on cutting-edge NLP and large language models. Publish papers, contribute to open-source, and push the state-of-the-art.
requirements: PhD or equivalent experience in NLP, ML, or related field
Strong publication record in top-tier conferences (NeurIPS, ICML, ACL)
Experience training large language models from scratch
Proficiency with transformer architectures (BERT, GPT, T5)
